name: Pitney Bowes Inc.
description: Pitney Bowes Inc. is a global technology company that provides innovative commerce solutions, including digital shipping, mailing, and financial services. The company operates primarily through its SendTech Solutions and Presort Services segments, facilitating billions of physical and digital transactions worldwide. Headquartered in the United States, Pitney Bowes has a long-standing history of helping businesses of all sizes navigate the complexities of shipping and logistics. By leveraging advanced technology and data, the company enables clients to streamline their operations, improve customer experiences, and achieve greater efficiency in an increasingly interconnected global marketplace.
